name_local: Barrio de San Basilio - Zona de Patios

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Patio de la Reja is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el Patio de la Reja?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el PAH-tee-oh deh lah REH-hah?

likely_response.local: Siga recto, segunda calle a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh seh-GOON-dah KAHL-leh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, second street on the left.

responses.english: Go straight, second street on the left.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh seh-GOON-dah KAHL-leh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Siga recto, segunda calle a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which patios are open today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué patios están abiertos hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh PAH-tyohs eh-STAHN ah-BYEHr-tohs oy

likely_response.local: Casa de las Columnas y Viana
likely_response.pronunciation: KAH-sah DEH LAHS koh-LOOM-nahs Y bee-AH-nah
likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the information board.

responses.english: It is indicated on the information board.
responses.phonetic: KAH-sah DEH LAHS koh-LOOM-nahs Y bee-AH-nah
responses.local: Casa de las Columnas y Viana

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy festival entry ticket
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro la entrada del festival?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh KOHM-proh lah en-TRAH-dah del fehs-tee-VAHL?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla municipal, calle San Basilio.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah moo-nee-thee-PAHL KAHL-leh SAHN bah-see-LEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the municipal ticket office, San Basilio street.

responses.english: At the municipal ticket office, San Basilio street.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah moo-nee-thee-PAHL KAHL-leh SAHN bah-see-LEE-oh
responses.local: En la taquilla municipal, calle San Basilio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this patio allows photographs
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se permiten fotos en este patio?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿seh pehr-MEE-tehn FOH-tohs en EH-steh PAH-tee-oh?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the entrance.

responses.english: It is indicated at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to join guided patio route
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es el punto de encuentro para la ruta?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day ehs el POON-toh day en-koo-EN-troh PAH-rah lah ROO-tah?

likely_response.local: Frente a la iglesia, bajo el toldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: FREHN-teh AH LAH eeh-leh-SEE-ah BAH-hoh EHL TOHL-doh
likely_response.translation_en: In front of the church, under the awning.

responses.english: In front of the church, under the awning.
responses.phonetic: FREHN-teh AH LAH eeh-leh-SEE-ah BAH-hoh EHL TOHL-doh
responses.local: Frente a la iglesia, bajo el toldo.
